meaning: n.果园,果园里的全部果树,<美俚>棒球场
examples: Proudly step into my orchard, my queen.
An evil person is a blight in the orchard.
Closer to Orchard Road, the giant Zouk and Velvet Underground are popular with Singaporean college students.
The Orchard Bank MasterCard is just about the easiest unsecured card to qualify for.
